def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    rsi_period = params['rsi_period']
    atr_period = params['atr_period']
    threshold = params['threshold']
    df['rsi'] = ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=rsi_period)
    df['atr'] = ta.volatility.average_true_range(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=atr_period)
    df['signal'] = 0
    df.loc[(df['rsi'] > (100 - threshold)) & (df['close'] < df['close'].shift(1)), 'signal'] = -1
    df.loc[(df['rsi'] < threshold) & (df['close'] > df['close'].shift(1)), 'signal'] = 1
    return df['signal'].astype(int)
rationale: XAG/USD exhibits momentum reversal behavior where extreme RSI readings combined with ATR-filtered price movements signal potential reversals.
